channel.title: INfinance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INfinance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Consumers are more upbeat about the U.S. economy than previously thought
item.description: Consumer spending has been the most important driver of economic growth over the past year.

item.title: AMD’s stock rockets as Meta deal serves as major validation point for investors
item.description: Meta, looking to diversify beyond Nvidia, bets big on AMD chips, with a chance to invest in the company.

item.title: ‘I found out too late’: My stepmother cheated me out of $500K from my father’s estate. What can I do?
item.description: “Within a week or two after the deadline to contest the will expired, my stepmother sent me an email stating she would not share anything.”

item.title: AI will lead to mass unemployment, a new paper says — but other researchers are skeptical
item.description: The Citrini Research paper imagines a scenario in which widespread AI adoption leads to disruption and societal chaos. Evercore called it “thought-pro...

item.title: My grandpa retired happily at 70 with $750K after working as a missionary. I know where most Americans go wrong.
item.description: “You could even retire at 55 with $500,000 and be perfectly fine. Am I right?”

item.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
item.description: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia...

item.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
item.description: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

item.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

item.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
item.description: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

item.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
item.description: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on ...
